metadata.purpose: Company context, market position, and Denver satellite's role

denver_satellite.value_proposition: Regional presence for convenient customer access in Denver/Rocky Mountain area

competitive_advantages.network_scale: Multiple satellite locations for customer convenience

regulatory_context.importance: Non-negotiable - loss of certification = cannot operate

denver_positioning.market_role: Regional satellite serving Colorado/Rocky Mountain region
denver_positioning.competitive_context: Competing with other MRO facilities in area
challenges: Satellite overhead vs main facility economies

success_metrics_context.why_ab_ratio_matters: Satellites must prove efficiency to justify operating costs vs centralizing at main facilities
success_metrics_context.why_nps_matters: Customer satisfaction justifies satellite presence - customers could travel to main facility otherwise
success_metrics_context.why_training_matters: FAA compliance + service quality require ongoing technician development

culture_values.team_engagement: Culture audit goals - regular team activities
culture_values.operational_excellence: Continuous improvement in efficiency and quality
